title: Testing in Node.js Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of the 3 levels of testing (Unit/Integration/E2E), using Jest and Supertest as industry standard tools, and TDD.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily role of 'Testing' in a professional Node.js application?
options: Verifying that every feature of your application works exactly as expected to prevent bugs before reaching users.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.

questions.question: Which type of test focuses on verifying that a single, small function (like a math calculation) works correctly in isolation?
Which popular all-in-one testing framework is the modern industry standard for Node.js and React?
Which specialized tool would you use to simulate HTTP requests (like app.get('/users')) to test your Express API?
Does following 'Test-Driven Development' (TDD) help build truly Fullstack applications by forcing developers to think about feature requirements before writing code?
options: Yes, as it is a core feature of any high-quality production web application development process.
